run_summary.summary: Active day for the pipeline. Flexsteel/Steinhafels store visit happened today with a TOMORROW (Apr 24) deadline to apply on the Popfly platform — Kenny said he'd handle it after the store visit, but this needs to not fall through the cracks. Linkind SP6 has a confirmed content deadline of Monday/Tuesday (Apr 27-28) with detailed filming specs from the brand. SOJOS is in final revision — Liz submitted her voice-over edit today and is waiting on Ruby's approval. Yousky PR gave their definitive final answer today: $250 max, no exceptions. If Yousky is in the pipeline, close it — that $1750 rate gap is never closing.

suggestions.message: 🚨 Popfly campaign enrollment closes TOMORROW (Apr 24). Kenny and Liz visited Steinhafels today for content — Kenny told Ian he'd apply to the Popfly platform when they got back from the store. Ian gave a 👍 but the window closes tomorrow. Make sure the application actually gets submitted today.

Luna from Yousky PR gave her firm final answer today: $250 max, no exceptions. Liz has been at $2000 since March and sent another follow-up today — Luna came back with the same $250. If Yousky is in the pipeline, recommend closing it out. Rate gap is unbridgeable and the brand isn't moving.

deals.next_action: Apply to Flexsteel/Steinhafels campaign on Popfly platform — deadline tomorrow Apr 24 (URGENT)
deals.notes: [Apr 23]: Kenny and Liz visited Steinhafels store today for content creation. Ian (Popfly) reopened the campaign enrollment window which had previously showed 'applications closed.' Kenny confirmed he'll apply to the Popfly platform when they return from the store. Deadline to apply is Apr 24. Parent card update — this is campaign enrollment, not a specific deliverable.
deals.activity_note: Apr 23: Steinhafels store visit for Flexsteel content — Ian (Popfly) reopened enrollment window, Kenny confirmed he'll apply to platform before Apr 24 deadline [parent card]

deals.next_action: Film and submit SP6 nighttime content — brand deadline is Mon/Tue Apr 27-28
deals.notes: [Apr 23]: Content deadline confirmed — brand wants Linkind SP6 video by Monday/Tuesday (Apr 27-28). Liz confirmed she can deliver, possibly sooner. Filming specs from brand: nighttime-only filming required (no daylight shots), lighting effects should take up ~50% of video (not just the SP6 product), must show app controlling and switching patterns with dynamic color changes and animations, correct lens installation position required, visuals and voiceover must match.
deals.activity_note: Apr 23: Linkind SP6 content deadline confirmed — Mon/Tue Apr 27-28, nighttime filming, app controls, lighting effects focus

deals.next_action: Wait for Ruby's final approval on revised SOJOS video with voice-over
deals.notes:
[Apr 23]: Liz submitted revised video to Drive with voice-over per Ruby's request. Waiting for final brand approval.
[Apr 22]: Liz submitted initial video to Drive with caption ('The sunnies I'm rocking this season! Comment SUN for link! @sojosvision...', 10% off code: MISSLIZSOJOS). Ruby (SOJOS Vision marketing) asked for voice-over introducing the brand to be added.
deals.activity_note: Apr 23: Liz resubmitted SOJOS video with voice-over revision — waiting for Ruby's (SOJOS Vision) final approval
